---
title: "Team Challenge Scoreboard"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, ../slides/custom.scss]
    slide-number: false
    controls: false
    progress: false
    center: true
    transition: none
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(tidyverse)

# =====================================================================
# UPDATE THIS SECTION EACH WEEK
# =====================================================================
# Replace team names after Session 2 (students choose names)
# Update point totals each Monday before class

week <- 2  # Current week number

scoreboard <- tribble(
  ~team,              ~pair_coding, ~assignments, ~quizzes, ~fun_challenge,
  "Team 1",           0,            0,            0,        0,
  "Team 2",           0,            0,            0,        0,
  "Team 3",           0,            0,            0,        0,
  "Team 4",           0,            0,            0,        0,
  "Team 5",           0,            0,            0,        0,
  "Team 6",           0,            0,            0,        0,
  "Team 7",           0,            0,            0,        0,
  "Team 8",           0,            0,            0,        0,
  "Team 9",           0,            0,            0,        0,
)

# =====================================================================
# Everything below is automatic — no need to edit
# =====================================================================

scoreboard <- scoreboard |>
  mutate(
    total = pair_coding + assignments + quizzes + fun_challenge,
    team = fct_reorder(team, total)
  )

# Color: leading team(s) get highlight color, others get gray
max_pts <- max(scoreboard$total)
scoreboard <- scoreboard |>
  mutate(
    is_leader = total == max_pts & total > 0
  )
```

## Week `r week` Standings

```{r}
#| label: scoreboard-chart
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 5.5

# Bar chart
ggplot(scoreboard, aes(x = total, y = team, fill = is_leader)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = total),
    hjust = -0.3,
    size = 5,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("TRUE" = "#e67e22", "FALSE" = "#95a5a6"),
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Total Points",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 18) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16)
  )
```

---

## Point Breakdown

```{r}
#| label: scoreboard-table

scoreboard |>
  arrange(desc(total), team) |>
  select(
    Team = team,
    `Pair Coding` = pair_coding,
    Assignments = assignments,
    Quizzes = quizzes,
    `Fun Challenge` = fun_challenge,
    Total = total
  ) |>
  knitr::kable(align = c("l", "c", "c", "c", "c", "c"))
```
